feed.title: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,850 supported skills.

entry.title: pulp
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for the Pulp audio framework — build, test, design, and ship audio plugins and apps

entry.title: chrest
entry.content: chrest — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: kratos
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestrator for features, research, and project insights

entry.title: cowork-to-code-bridge
entry.content: Connect Claude Cowork to Claude Code on your own computer (macOS or Linux). Cowork hands a task to a local Claude Code agent (and can run approved scripts too); the bridge is idempotent, streams progress, and is token-protected. Install with one command; it sets up a global Cowork skill so every session connects automatically — no /plugin, no setup inside Cowork.

entry.title: ml-odyssey-skills
entry.content: Skills migrated to ProjectMnemosyne for cross-project reuse

entry.title: kto-ma-racje-toolkit
entry.content: Marcin's personal Claude Code toolkit — bundles full-audit, lessons-update, TDD workflow, agent teams, search-tools-mastery, vibesec, subagent-driven-development. Includes auto-load-lessons SessionStart hook for the kto-ma-racje project.

entry.title: dinopowers
entry.content: Wrapper skills over superpowers:* that inject tea-rags signals (risk, ownership, churn, impact) into brainstorming, planning, execution, debugging, and review flows

entry.title: intermix
entry.content: Cross-repo matrix evaluation harness — run Skaffen against unfamiliar codebases, classify outcomes, track failure patterns.

entry.title: clawbio
entry.content: Bioinformatics-native AI agent skill library — pharmacogenomics, ancestry, scRNA-seq, metagenomics, variant annotation, genome comparison, and more. 24 skills with deterministic Python execution, reproducibility bundles, and local-first privacy.

entry.title: gdb-mcp
entry.content: Multi-session GDB and gdbserver debugging through MCP.

entry.title: coding-conventions
entry.content: On-demand, per-scope catalog of coding conventions; captures reusable patterns at checkpoints and scaffolds a project-local catalog in any repo.

entry.title: vision-mcp
entry.content: Vision-MCP: 视觉为主的桌面 GUI 操作 MCP server + Skill。Agent 可像人一样使用真实桌面应用（截图 → 视觉/AX 双轨识别 → click/type/key），支持持续修正 + 安全审批。

entry.title: rag-reviewer
entry.content: Agentic PR review: hybrid RAG + code graph via MCP, review skills for Claude Code

entry.title: redteam
entry.content: Adversarial agent-pair harness: one model writes code (plan → implement), a second model reviews it adversarially; the draft PR is the human checkpoint before merge (a single-model test-first TDD mode is also available).

entry.title: cc-plus
entry.content: A plugin that extends the capabilities of Claude Code by adding some useful and cool features and functionalities.

entry.title: tk
entry.content: SoT gap, route, reflect, learn, ui-diff와 grill/prototype/merge-conflict/handoff/to-prd/to-issues/arch-review를 제공하는 TigerKit Claude Code 플러그인입니다.

entry.title: tea-rags-setup
entry.content: Automated TeaRAGs installation wizard — Node.js, embedding providers, Qdrant, MCP configuration

entry.title: hyperclaude
entry.content: Push Claude Code beyond stock. Skills, agents, Codex collab — opinionated and personal.

entry.title: nervepack
entry.content: Personal AI context hub: skills (behavior), sources (curated technical refs), wiki (LLM-owned synthesis), and re-runnable Ubuntu setup. Karpathy-style LLM-wiki layer on top of a skill library.

entry.title: punchcard
entry.content: Drive AI coding agents through a punchcard board: a PM files tasks, an Engineer ships them as reviewed PRs with proof of work.

entry.title: obsidian-knowledge
entry.content: Claude Code plugin that manages an Obsidian knowledge vault: capture, organize, index, and garden

entry.title: ai-config
entry.content: d-morrison's personal Claude Code skills (PR/review workflow, grading, reprexes, R-package helpers) and slash commands.

entry.title: drt-hub
entry.content: Skills for drt — Reverse ETL for the code-first data stack

entry.title: aicoach-framework
entry.content: Multi-agent AI coach for endurance & strength athletes — runs entirely inside Claude Code.

entry.title: aegis
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: axhub
entry.content: Korean-first Claude Code plugin for axhub. onboarding/bootstrap/deploy/import/development/diagnosis/clarity/update 8개 스킬이 ax-hub-cli v0.20.0+ 표면(hidden plugin-support 그룹 + 공개 deploy verify·diagnose·update)을 직접 호출해요. import 는 기존 로컬 앱 가져오기를, diagnosis 는 배포 실패 원인 요약을 담당하고, preview-confirm 배포와 verify 기반 성공 선언을 제공해요.

entry.title: pysheeet
entry.content: Comprehensive Python programming reference covering syntax, concurrency, networking, databases, ML/LLM development, and HPC

entry.title: forge
entry.content: A stage-by-stage workflow skill set (fg-*). A development loop that takes one task through a single cycle of ask·plan → execute → retro → done. Consists of fg-ask (inquiry/triage + grill-with-docs-style conversational grilling), fg-run (backlog selection menu · Run all, Dynamic Workflow execution), fg-learn (retro · doc promotion), and fg-done (done · seal · re-run guard), plus fg-map — an on-demand utility outside the loop that maps the codebase into .forge/codebase/ with parallel subagents so grilling reads a map instead of re-exploring the code (cuts context rot), and fg-quick — a lightweight lane outside the loop for trivial tasks that still grills lightly but skips formal artifacts (no ADR/plan/retro), records one line to .forge/quick/LOG.md, runs directly, and bails to fg-ask if the task turns out non-trivial, fg-status — a read-only reporter that surveys .forge/ and prints where every task stands plus the single next step you need (writes nothing, never auto-runs), fg-next — derives that same next step and runs it, announcing the step then invoking the skill rather than only reporting it (one-shot, except that a retro concluding without a re-grill recommendation chains straight into the seal — ADR-0026; fg-status reports, fg-next acts), with an 'all' mode (fg-next all) that drives backlog tasks to completion until empty, auto-progressing mechanical steps and halting at conversational walls, and fg-tdd — toggles persistent TDD mode in .forge/config.json (fg-ask then defaults to asking, fg-run runs test-first), and fg-eco — toggles eco mode in .forge/config.json (when on it activates loop-wide efficiency: fg-run caps its delegated workflow subagents at sonnet — lower only, the session model is untouched — and the embedded Eco laziness-first discipline in skills/fg-eco/ECO.md (code simplicity plus terse-communication output, caveman-derived) is injected into fg-run subagents, woven into fg-ask grilling as a YAGNI lens, and adopted by the current session — ADR-0014), and fg-loop — a goal-driven momentum loop with bounded replan: an initial conversational inquiry pins a machine-verifiable stop condition, an authorized fix-forward replan scope, and a replan cap (default 3 rounds) into .forge/loop.md, then it drives tasks unattended (run → UAT → auto-skip retro → seal, auto-selecting recommended defaults at every soft decision and asking the user nothing) until the checks pass, generating in-scope fix-forward tasks within the cap and halting only at the walls (unverifiable UAT, genuine fork, cap exhausted, no progress, check-tension oscillation, safety/irreversible action — ADR-0016). On a non-default git branch the whole forge state moves under .forge/branch/<branch>/ (git-tracked, namespaced so parallel branches never collide on .forge state — ADR-0011), and fg-merge — an outside-the-loop utility that, after you git merge a branch, integrates that branch's .forge/branch/<branch>/ into .forge/ (renumbering ADRs and rewriting cross-references, merging CONTEXT terms, folding done history, removing the branch folder; halts on genuine conflicts), and fg-cleanup — an outside-the-loop utility that retires stale or superseded ADRs to .forge/adr/retired/ on your approval, keeping the active decision set current without deleting the why (ADR-0012), and fg-statusline — an outside-the-loop setup utility that installs a bash fragment script reading .forge/ and wires it into settings.json so your terminal statusline shows the current loop progress (active task·stage, goal-loop indicator, or backlog count); since Claude Code allows only one statusLine it auto-wraps your existing one as an extra row rather than replacing it (ADR-0017), and fg-adversarial-review — an outside-the-loop utility that runs an optional adversarial review between fg-run and fg-learn: it assumes the result is wrong and fans out six lenses (failure points, hidden assumptions, misread requirements, security/performance/data-loss, unexpected misuse, weak decisions) as parallel workflow subagents, records findings to .forge/review.md, and on your approval turns fix-needed findings into a fix-forward plan to run again — optional, never a seal gate, always auto-skipped in unattended drives (ADR-0018), and fg-doctor — a read-only integrity health check (outside the loop) that surveys the .forge/ state contract and the docs/manifests and reports inconsistencies with a severity and an actionable fix hint each (orphaned run.md, broken/missing STATUS fields, slug-pairing mismatches, half-sealed done/, manifest version drift across the 3 places, README bilingual drift, skills missing from CLAUDE.md); it writes nothing and never auto-fixes — fg-status reports where you are, fg-doctor reports whether the state is healthy (ADR-0019), and fg-drop — an outside-the-loop utility that discards incomplete work you no longer want (a backlog plan, the active slot, an awaiting-retro task in executed/, or a halted goal loop): it lists the items with a per-item risk level (a checkbox dialog for ≤4, a numbered text list for ≥5), then a separate question to hard-delete (default, no trace) or archive to .forge/dropped/, behind a confirmation gate that warns already-run code is not reverted; it removes forge state only — never git, never your code — and a halted goal loop is dropped whole with its member tasks excluded from individual drop (ADR-0021), and fg-agents — an outside-the-loop utility that generates a project's domain agents by conversational grilling (outside any workflow): it derives the recurring, separable roles in the project and writes standard Claude Code subagent cards to .claude/agents/<role>.md, each description carrying a 'when to use' so fg-run can dispatch a matching role as agentType; the cards load at session start so they take effect only after a restart, and the whole path is graceful — a project with no domain agents runs exactly as before (ADR-0024). Use in contexts like 'start a new task', 'start with forge', 'let's work on this', 'refine the plan', 'map the codebase', 'forge quick', 'forge status', 'forge next', 'forge loop', 'forge tdd', 'forge eco', 'forge merge', 'forge cleanup', 'forge statusline', 'adversarial review', '적대적 리뷰', 'forge doctor', '무결성 검사', '상태 점검', 'forge drop', '작업 버리기', '계획 지워', 'forge agents', '도메인 에이전트 만들어', 'create project agents'.

entry.title: qiushi-skill
entry.content: Qiushi Skill: methodology skills for AI agents guided by seeking truth from facts, with Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, Codex, OpenCode, and Hermes guidance.

entry.title: sdlc-agents
entry.content: SDLC workflow agents and skills for Plane Conductor — BABOK, C4, DDD, ISTQB, OWASP, WCAG-grounded.

entry.title: autumn
entry.content: Domain knowledge, CLI wrappers, scaffolding commands, and code review for the autumn-web Rust framework

entry.title: t3
entry.content: Personal code factory for multi-repo projects

entry.title: overcast
entry.content: Give any agent senses (video/audio/image understanding) and OSINT reach (search/capture/monitor), organized around an investigation case. Built on pi with the tinycloud/Cloudglue perception backend.

entry.title: summer
entry.content: Agent tooling for Summer Engine: game-dev skills, lifecycle hooks, and a 52-tool MCP bridge to the local desktop app.

entry.title: open-second-brain
entry.content: Plugin-first second brain package for AI agents and humans.

entry.title: repo-forensics
entry.content: Offline security scanner for AI-agent repos, skills, plugins, and MCP servers

entry.title: agent-reachout
entry.content: Multi-provider notification plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: bridge
entry.content: Bridge — global task manager for Claude Code. Dependency-aware DAG, persists across repos/sessions.

entry.title: sota-skills
entry.content: State-of-the-art engineering skills (2026) for building and auditing software across 38 domains and languages — security, architecture, APIs, databases, cloud, Kubernetes, observability, testing, LLM engineering, UX writing, copywriting, and more — with a master router and BUILD/AUDIT modes (39 skills).

entry.title: juggle
entry.content: Multi-topic conversation orchestrator. Manage parallel conversation threads within a single Claude Code session — discuss one topic while background agents research or build for others.

entry.title: pdd
entry.content: PDD (Parity-Driven Development) — framework para refactor/rewrite/port de sistemas legados com paridade comportamental rastreável: evidência objetiva (score de confiança + harness de comparação), testes de caracterização, QA como portão de merge, PR-dossiê e painel de progresso.

entry.title: superlore
entry.content: Scaffold, author, deploy, release, and connect a superlore knowledge base — author once in MDX, humans get a clean visual site and agents get a first-class MCP over the same structured content. Say "Make me a docs using superlore" to start.

entry.title: rig
entry.content: rig — a quality-gated AI workbench for Claude Code. `/rig:rig "<task>"` classifies the task, shows why (a routing banner), composes the right harness, runs it in an isolated git worktree (patterns/isolated-worktree + scripts/workbench.py), checks it against explicit acceptance-gate criteria (standard + bugfix/feature/refactor/review/security presets, resolving to passed/passed_with_warnings/failed/pending/skipped), and only lands the diff on `accept` — whose accept_requirements checklist (worktree_exists/base_branch_recorded/diff_summary_generated) can't be bypassed even with --force. `/rig:rig board` gives a single dashboard of every active task — run several tasks at once via `/rig:queue go --provider rig` (each dispatched through the same isolation, so parallel headless processes never collide) and never lose track across terminals. Visual-verification screenshots (patterns/visual-artifacts) live under `.rig/` and are pruned by `workbench.py gc` (age-based) or immediately on `discard` — disposable evidence, not the deliverable. `/rig:rig stats` aggregates past runs and flags reviewers with zero rejects as possible rubber stamps. Also a LEGO-style harness composer: compose bricks (facets/patterns/steps/recipes) at invocation time into a task-specific agent harness. Domain-agnostic engine: dev-flow orchestration (review, implement, PR), pluggable packs — sales deal-review, a conversational mode (rig:talk), a goal-driven loop (rig:goal), existing-PR review (rig:pr), GitHub Issue/PR/CI workflows (rig:rig gh), a reviewer-detection-rate drill (rig:drill) scoring detection/severity/blocking/explanation accuracy, and a prose AI-smell remover (de-ai-smell) — plus a --validate doctor, a /rig:init scaffolder, generators for reviewer personas (/rig:persona) and LLM-wiki domain knowledge (/rig:knowledge), self-extension that authors new bricks/packs from a description and validates them (/rig:forge), a /rig:catalog cross-tier registry, and run-continuity that survives context compaction via a shipped PreCompact hook. Tiered (project/global) personas and a cross-linked knowledge wiki keep domain knowledge shared, not siloed. Claude Code native; no heavy DSL engine.

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: ai-mentor
entry.content: Learn the Claude Code capabilities you didn't know existed. A discovery mentor that reads your setup, remembers what you already use, and teaches your highest-leverage gap — one demonstrated move at a time, grounded in your repo, never repeating itself.

entry.title: delegate-team
entry.content: Agentic engineering supersystem - install once, run /mavis-ship "<task>" or dt run "<task>" anywhere. Bundles the /mavis-ship orchestrator, multi-agent team framework, skill scaffolder, agent-kernel (memory + governance), and four companion frameworks (superpowers, Waza, unslop-preflight, autoresearch) on top of the original dt gateway CLI.

entry.title: soapbox-agent
entry.content: Soapbox core sustainability intelligence — RSRA, CRREM pathways, retrofit advisor, and report template engine. Skills, agents, and MCP tools for real estate sustainability teams.

entry.title: alp-river
entry.content: Multi-step agent refinement for Claude Code: a deterministic router composes the exact stages each task needs.

entry.title: tea-rags
entry.content: Data-driven code generation strategies powered by TeaRAGs git signals

entry.title: mehtab-skills
entry.content: Freelance business skills plus a model-routing expert team: Fiverr/Upwork selling, contracts, clients, agency ops, and a router that delegates tasks to haiku/sonnet/opus/fable specialist subagents (web dev, AI, DevOps, product, security, data, docs).

entry.title: review-buddy
entry.content: AI-assisted narrative code review for Claude Code — an agent reads your PR, writes a Prologue, and segments it into risk-rated Chapters you walk through in the browser.

entry.title: weekly-report
entry.content: Generate English weekly reports from Git/SVN commit history

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Universal agentic skill library for Claude Code with 1,254+ reusable skills across coding, security, design, product, and operations workflows.

entry.title: wire-preview
entry.content: The Wire Framework — AI-accelerated data platform delivery for the full lifecycle: requirements, design, development, testing, deployment, enablement

entry.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
entry.content: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

entry.title: jira
entry.content: Comprehensive Jira integration with auto-detection of issue keys

entry.title: personal-corp-skills
entry.content: Personal Corp framework: run your business with AI agents through GitHub, department repos, Telegram, agent gateways, html-draft diagrams, and media/art-direction workflows

entry.title: m3
entry.content: Local-first persistent memory for Claude Code — 101 MCP tools, hybrid search (FTS5 + vector + MMR), bitemporal contradictions, GDPR primitives, chatlog auto-capture, multi-agent handoffs.

entry.title: eli5-gate
entry.content: Pre-implementation necessity gate for GitHub issues: plain-language intent ELI5, staleness/necessity verdict against post-filing history, and a plan-approval checkpoint before any code is written.

entry.title: fosmvvm-generators
entry.content: FOSMVVM architecture generators for ViewModels, Fields, DataModels, ServerRequests, Leaf Views, and ViewModel Tests

entry.title: oli-dev
entry.content: Conduz o ciclo de desenvolvimento OLI encadeando skills do superpowers com gates opinativos (worktree sempre, conductor sempre Opus, tier de modelo full/light nos subagentes despachados, pre-push obrigatório, finalize pós-merge). Depende do plugin superpowers.

entry.title: sessionmovie
entry.content: Turn a Claude Code session into a 45-60s rendered movie — /movie films the current session.

entry.title: lightningrod-python-sdk
entry.content: Lightningrod Python SDK — forecasting inference skills

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: telegram
entry.content: Telegram channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

entry.title: agent-toolkit
entry.content: A collection of project-agnostic skills for common engineering tasks such as ticket refinement, planning, code reviews, agent memory hygiene, skill authoring, and more.

entry.title: usap-skills
entry.content: Unified Security Agent Platform — 79 cybersecurity skills + 12 cs-* orchestrator agents that emit a typed 11-field JSON output contract, mapped to MITRE ATT&CK and NIST CSF 2.0. Runs in any LLM. Bundles 7 slash commands (usap:run, usap:fortigate, usap:orchestrate, usap:challenge, usap:compare, usap:test, usap:README) and 6 user-invocable orchestrator skills (Alex, CISO, DevSecOps, Incident Responder, Program Manager, Red Team).

entry.title: linear
entry.content: Fetch full Linear issue context and draft session/daily/weekly progress updates via the Linear MCP

entry.title: pyseam
entry.content: Teaches Claude to reach for the pyseam CLI on semantic Python work — symbol search (find/describe), cross-file renames (symbols, modules, packages), and inline — instead of hand-editing.

entry.title: crucible-suite
entry.content: Complete writing system for epic fantasy novels using the Crucible Structureâ€”a 36-beat narrative framework with three interwoven story strands. Includes planning, outlining, prose writing with bi-chapter reviews, and editing.

entry.title: agent-design-patterns
entry.content: Maps Google Cloud's validated multi-agent design patterns (Sequential, Parallel, Loop, Coordinator, Hierarchical) onto Claude Code's dynamic Workflow tool, so multi-agent orchestration follows a proven control-flow shape instead of an improvised one.

entry.title: hephaestus
entry.content: Shared tooling plugin for the HomericIntelligence ecosystem. Ships 23 skills: skill-advisor, advise, learn, myrmidon-swarm, brainstorm, test-driven-development, systematic-debugging, verification, git-worktrees, finish-branch, code-review, repo-analyze, repo-analyze-quick, repo-analyze-strict, repo-analyze-full, repo-analyze-quick-full, repo-analyze-strict-full, review-pr-strict, worktree-cleanup, tidy, create-reusable-utilities, github-actions-python-cicd, and python-repo-modernization.

entry.title: claudeclaw-plus
entry.content: ClaudeClaw+ — governance, orchestration, persistent memory, and hardened web UI for Claude Code daemons. Sister project to moazbuilds/claudeclaw.

entry.title: dev-pomogator
entry.content: Team coding standards and workflows for Claude Code: skills (create-spec, run-tests, plan-pomogator, etc.), rules, hooks, and MCP servers — distributed via canonical Anthropic marketplace.

entry.title: pantry
entry.content: Your agent checks the pantry before going shopping. Blocks duplicate dependencies, points at code you already have.

entry.title: oh-my-claudecode
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: home-assistant-skills
entry.content: Agent skills for Home Assistant: best practices for automations, helpers, templates, device control, and dashboards.

entry.title: aeat
entry.content: Operate the aeat Spanish-tax CLI: grounded search over the bundled BOE/AEAT legal corpus, situation-keyed guided workflows, and gated execution that never files to AEAT.

entry.title: ai-founder-kb
entry.content: Queryable knowledge base of AI startup founder learnings, frameworks, and podcast transcripts. ~400 curated insights from 150+ founders + 1,600+ raw transcripts (Sequoia, 20VC, Dwarkesh, Acquired, Latent Space, Cheeky Pint, Cognitive Revolution, Lenny's).

entry.title: patinaproject-skills
entry.content: patinaproject-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: claude-code-memory
entry.content: Claude Codeの記憶を外部DBに保存し、セッション間で知識・決定事項・アクティビティを永続化する

entry.title: metaspace-membrane
entry.content: Deny-by-default agent membrane: a PreToolUse hook that keeps the coding agent inside a hardened .bio constitution (project-only writes, network host allowlist, dangerous-command block).

entry.title: tabbrew
entry.content: Manage Chrome tabs with TabBrew Scripts. Just say what you want — "tidy up my tabs", "close duplicates", or "group my shopping tabs together". Also sends HTML docs to TabBrew: "send this HTML to TabBrew", "upload this doc to TabBrew Docs", "push this report to tabbrew".

entry.title: koyospec
entry.content: Spec 驱动开发工作流：提案→开发→归档，四份递进文档+硬门禁

entry.title: dev-skills
entry.content: 团队 git 工作流 + bug 修复 + 执行闭环 + 设计上下文 skill 套件:dev-auto / dev-grill-docs / dev-spec(alias) / dev-plan / dev-tdd / dev-fix / dev-verify / dev-code-review / dev-commit-writer / dev-finish / dev-design-context。共享 Karpathy 行为基线 + RALPLAN-DR 共识机制 + hypothesis-driven 调试 + TDD + 完成前验证 + 分支收尾 + 一次性设计上下文沉淀 + 需求拷问、spec 生成和可选 CONTEXT / ADR 沉淀。dev-auto 是松耦合入口推荐器,不调起其他 skill,只指路。

entry.title: iam-policy-validator
entry.content: AWS IAM policy validation, analysis, and security auditing via the iam-policy-validator CLI (CLI-based alternative to the MCP server).

entry.title: kraken
entry.content: Crisp/Blue Yonder development skills: C# style, JDA Space Automation, OpenAccess controls, Data Manager converter, and deployment package generation.

entry.title: ml-intern
entry.content: ultra-instinct ML engineering intern for Claude Code. Reads papers, audits datasets, ships SFT/DPO/LoRA runs to Hugging Face. Built on the procedural knowledge from huggingface/ml-intern, wired into Claude Code's native agentic harness.

entry.title: kerby
entry.content: kerby — the gate guardian for agentic coding. A loadable rule-corpus plus opt-in guardrail hooks that govern how an AI agent does coding work: clarity over cleverness, safety over speed, never leave the repo broken, and nothing unproven passes the gate. Load it into a session, reload after compaction, install per-project hooks, prepare an existing repo, or audit a repo's conformance to the rules.

entry.title: receipts
entry.content: Make your coding agents prove their work: a recorded visual-QA walkthrough + the reasoning behind a PR, packaged into one receipt a human can judge in ~90 seconds. Bundles the `receipts` skill; the CLI lives in the repo.

entry.title: claude-dev-kit
entry.content: Workshop plugin: endpoint-creator skill + dba subagent + SubagentStart hook that injects the DB schema as context.

entry.title: wrg-sigma-rules
entry.content: Production-grade sigma detection rule writing, validation, and conversion for SOC analysts and threat-intel teams. LLM-assisted draft + pySigma validation + multi-backend conversion (Splunk, Elastic, Wazuh). Built on 6+ months WRG threat-intel corpus (68-rule corpus + 100+ actor TTP corpus).

entry.title: php-modernization
entry.content: PHP 8.x modernization patterns with type safety and PHPStan

entry.title: elements-of-style
entry.content: Writing guidance based on William Strunk Jr.'s The Elements of Style (1918)

entry.title: ljg-skills
entry.content: LJG's personal Claude Code skills collection - paper reading, content casting, writing tools

entry.title: candid
entry.content: Configurable code review with radical candor - choose between harsh direct feedback or constructive caring criticism. Features Technical.md for project standards, architectural context analysis, actionable fixes, decision register for tracking review decisions, seamless todo integration, and live browser QA via Chrome.

entry.title: sumup
entry.content: Skills for SumUp payment integrations across terminal and online checkout flows

entry.title: superartes
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Universal agentic skill library for Claude Code with 1,254+ reusable skills across coding, security, design, product, and operations workflows.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,396 supported skills.

entry.title: void-grimoire
entry.content: Additive Claude Code skills, agents, and rules: session journaling, learned-correction persistence, prompt expansion, context discipline, and TypeScript/web rule baselines

entry.title: supeRpowers
entry.content: Comprehensive R programming assistant for Claude Code — tidyverse-first data analysis, package development, Shiny, statistics, and biostatistics.

entry.title: sensitive-canary
entry.content: Blocks secrets and PII before they reach the Anthropic API

entry.title: narwhal
entry.content: Local-first SEO & GEO/LLMO (AI-search) auditing for pages and sites: technical SEO, content/E-E-A-T, schema.org JSON-LD, and citability for AI answer engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews).

entry.title: npm
entry.content: NPM Registry client — query and manage packages, versions, dist-tags, downloads, access, stars, tokens, webhooks, orgs, and audit. Supports publish, unpublish, deprecate, custom registry, 8 mirrors, proxy, and auth token.

entry.title: hyperframes
entry.content: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

entry.title: biff-dev
entry.content: UNIX-style team communication for Claude Code: /who, /finger, /plan, /write, /read, /mesg, /tty, /last, /wall, /talk

entry.title: aigentry-devkit
entry.content: AI development environment kit: skills, hooks, MCP servers, and HUD for Claude Code and Codex CLI

entry.title: rawgentic
entry.content: 12 SDLC workflow skills + 4 workspace management + 1 planning skill + 1 security skill + hooks for Claude Code: project registration, setup, session binding, requirements interviewing, issue creation, feature implementation, bug fixing, refactoring, adversarial review, documentation, dependency updates, security audits, performance optimization, incident response, test suite creation, peer consultation, security pattern syncing, and dangerous pattern blocking with per-project exceptions.

entry.title: spec
entry.content: Spec-driven development plugin: research → ask → propose → HARD GATE → apply → verify → archive, enforced by 4 hooks (TBD scan / approval gate / archive audit / verify reminder), with scope-dispatched dev agents and a fresh-context verifier agent

entry.title: silver-bullet
entry.content: Agentic Process Orchestrator for AI-native Software Engineering & DevOps. Provides SB-owned lifecycle workflows, optional extension-plugin boundaries, and layered technical compliance.

entry.title: telegram
entry.content: claude-tg — drive Claude Code from Telegram. Built-in access control; manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

entry.title: squid
entry.content: Opinionated engineering agent team with progressive-disclosure specs for Python / TypeScript / Go monorepos. Ships PA / SWE / Tester / PR Reviewer / On-Call sub-agents, /squid-plan / /squid-implement-task / /squid-implement-night pipelines, and a library of language/framework/infra specs that agents load on-demand.

entry.title: vela-slides
entry.content: Create, edit, translate, rebrand, or present slide decks. Use when the user wants presentations, slides, decks, or keynotes — even without mentioning Vela by name.

entry.title: pixeltable
entry.content: Build multimodal AI applications with Pixeltable -- tables, computed columns, embedding search, UDFs, tool-calling agents, and 25+ AI provider integrations.

entry.title: cc-design
entry.content: High-fidelity HTML design skill with structured design planning, Iron Law guardrails, and verification-first delivery

entry.title: ai-dev-team
entry.content: Spec-driven AI development workflow: KB-centric specs, dual-model audit (Claude + Codex), execution workdocs with per-step compliance checks

entry.title: actionista
entry.content: GitHub Actions assistant - helps create, review, and optimize workflows with up-to-date action versions and best practices

entry.title: mdclaw
entry.content: Skills and CLIs for vibe-MD simulations and autonomous scientific investigation in the Amber/OpenMM ecosystem

entry.title: systems-thinking-skills
entry.content: Claude Code skills for systems thinking: stock-flow / causal-loop diagram critique with archetype identification (W2), stock-flow simulation commissioning (W3 — emit a brief that your AI agent uses to build an interactive HTML simulation app), Meadows leverage-point mapping for a stated goal (W4), and the W6 'redraw the box' pair — Goldratt Theory-of-Constraints constraint-finding and Altshuller TRIZ contradiction-dissolving. Plus why-tree: a heavyweight multi-agent Goldratt Current-Reality-Tree instrument that builds an evidence-graded causal tree and converges on the one binding constraint. From the AI + Systems Thinking course (Empatika).

entry.title: config-lsp
entry.content: Language Server Protocol configuration for Claude Code

entry.title: answerlayer
entry.content: Query your databases in natural language with AnswerLayer. Bundles the AnswerLayer CLI and a skill that configures your host + API key and drives inquiries, queries, the semantic layer, and dashboards.

entry.title: wtmcp
entry.content: MCP server with plugins for Jira, Confluence, GitLab, Google Calendar, Gmail, Google Drive, Google Docs, Testing Farm, Snyk, and GitHub

entry.title: doc-mirror
entry.content: The doc-mirror claude system: a 1:1 documentation mirror of any codebase, maintained by an invariant doc-mirror STATE MACHINE (per-module doc(m), 6 context/ index files, fork-on-change, no random documents). Bundles doc-mirror-boot (entry + core-loop prime + router), the doc-mirror-{init,seework,change,prompts} state-skills, doc-mirror-install (the host-setup WIZARD), ship-a-plugin (the build+distribute dev-flow), doc-mirror (THE LAW), and make-ai-operating-system (the architect for new systems of this class); the brainhook work-loop + session-start + transition-guard + readonly-guard hooks (plugin-native via CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT); the journal/projects/vision/plan/tracker/commit/cursor + docmirror-search CLI tools; and the doc-mirror law + behavior rules.

entry.title: druckenmiller
entry.content: Daily Druckenmiller conviction analysis. Fetches today's conviction score, 4-signal breakdown, and position recommendation from a live data pipeline.

entry.title: auto-claude-skills
entry.content: Enables agentic PDLC in Claude Code with phase-aware skill routing, guardrails, and workflow state recovery

entry.title: kagura-memory
entry.content: Kagura Memory Cloud plugin — restore session context, recall & save durable project knowledge, setup help, and an MCP smoke test

entry.title: mssql-performance-skills
entry.content: 26 SQL Server performance tuning skills for Claude Code — static T-SQL analysis, execution plans, wait stats, deadlock, query store, AG health, AG configuration, ERRORLOG, SPN, memory, disk I/O, encryption, configuration drift, setup bootstrap log, SSRS trace log review, and migration readiness

entry.title: maigo
entry.content: MyGO!!!!! 驅動的通用開發 agent flow。大家一起迷失吧。

entry.title: crw
entry.content: Scrape, crawl, map, search, parse, extract, and change-track the web with fastCRW — the open-source, self-hostable Firecrawl alternative. Single Rust binary, ~6 MB RAM, Firecrawl-compatible /v1 + /v2 API, bundled SearXNG search.

entry.title: vibe-replay
entry.content: Generate interactive HTML replays of AI coding sessions. Record, share, and replay your Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex sessions.

entry.title: agentic-patterns
entry.content: Streams all 26 Claude Code lifecycle events (tool calls, permissions, subagents, compaction, sessions) into the @agentic-patterns/server dashboard for live observability, and ships the `build-on-agentic-patterns` skill (how to register + build agents on the framework). Pair with `ap playground`. See https://github.com/pattern-stack/agentic-patterns-ts/blob/main/docs/CLAUDE-CODE-PLUGIN-ACTIVATION.md for activation + troubleshooting.

entry.title: spectra
entry.content: Capture screenshots, videos, and demos across platforms with a tagged library

entry.title: quarry-dev
entry.content: Local semantic search for Claude Code: /find, /ingest, /remember, /explain, /source, /quarry

entry.title: laconic
entry.content: Brief prose. Short common words. Trust context. State what matters. Omit what reader can infer.

entry.title: anthropic-docs
entry.content: Auto-updated multi-skill reference for the whole Anthropic doc ecosystem. 8 skills covering claude-code, claude-agent-sdk, anthropic-api, anthropic-platform-features, claude-connectors, claude-cowork, mcp-spec, and anthropic-pulse (news + research digests). Pipeline refreshes daily.

entry.title: vidseeds
entry.content: VidSeeds.ai connector for pre-upload video SEO & metadata optimization and multi-platform publishing from your AI client. 247 tools: titles/descriptions/tags, AI thumbnails, chapters, auto-clips, channel analytics & intelligence, keyword research, translation/captions (85 languages), and direct YouTube publishing. Includes workflow skills for efficient MCP use. Paid connector with a 14-day free trial. Auth via a free Personal Access Token (or OAuth 2.0 for Claude.ai / Desktop).

entry.title: pad
entry.content: A shared knowledge base for developers and AI agents. Provides slash commands to save, load, search, and brainstorm with project planning documents stored in Pad.

entry.title: kagura-cli
entry.content: Thin Claude Code skills over the Kagura Memory CLI (kagura): doctor, auth, setup, document ingestion, resource tokens, R2 file uploads, and zero-knowledge secrets.

entry.title: oh-my-hi
entry.content: Visual dashboard for Claude Code & Codex — usage/token analysis of skills, agents, plugins, hooks, memory, MCP servers, rules, and principles

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: hologit
entry.content: Skills for configuring and using hologit

entry.title: mthines-agent-skills
entry.content: Agent skills for code review, DX/UX analysis, TDD, holistic analysis, and developer productivity

entry.title: stdd-agents
entry.content: Spec-Test-Driven Development workflow plugin with skills for specification writing, test-driven development, and commit management

entry.title: Buddy
entry.content: Persistent AI coding companion with 21 species and personality stats.

entry.title: dromsak-skills
entry.content: Personal toolbox of Claude Code skills. Headline workflow is the AFK pipeline (afk-issues → afk-army → afk-uat) for backlog-driven parallel agent development; ships alongside architect, grill-me, and dromsak-guidelines.

entry.title: dj-music
entry.content: DJ techno music library management — 20 MCP dispatchers (6 entity CRUD + 3 provider + 2 compute + sync + 2 admin + 6 UI Prefab Apps) + 27 resources + 30 prompts + 6 handlers. FastMCP v3 bounded-contexts architecture.

entry.title: theloopskill
entry.content: Multi-agent workflow orchestration for Claude Code: pipeline/parallel/loop patterns with harness & loop engineering policies, plus skills for security code review, system/architecture design, project orchestration with per-task model routing, and multi-source research with adversarial fact-checking.

entry.title: aaronsilinskas-skills
entry.content: aaronsilinskas-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: brain-memory
entry.content: Brain by AIVM — governed persistent memory for Claude Code. Auto-recall on session start, ACL-filtered recall per prompt, session wrap + sync on exit; every access recorded to a tamper-evident ledger.

entry.title: loopcraft
entry.content: Loop engineering for Claude Code — rubric+verifier self-correction, 5-stage memory protocol (fail→investigate→verify→distill→consult), autonomous backlog runner

entry.title: viberaven
entry.content: VibeRaven Studio and architecture/production-context skills for AI-built apps.

entry.title: skills
entry.content: skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: agent-cast
entry.content: Closed-loop frontend workflow for Claude Code: build, preview, screenshot-critique, refine, and test UIs via the Playwright MCP server.

entry.title: deep-solve
entry.content: Delegate a hard self-contained problem to a deterministic solve→review convergence loop (delegating-hard-problems + review-to-convergence, automated end-to-end)

entry.title: prompt-pocket
entry.content: Cross-agent prompt pocket: remember your most-used prompts and pick one to run; auto-scans Claude Code, Codex and OpenCode sessions to record prompts repeated 7+ times. Forged by agent-plugin-kit.

entry.title: tia-portal-openness-mcp
entry.content: Siemens TIA Portal (博途) Openness automation via the TiaMcpServer MCP — project/PLC/HMI scaffolding, SCL/LAD authoring, compile, download, online read. Bundles the V21 server for one-command install.

entry.title: looptimal
entry.content: Turns an objective into a delivered, VERIFIED OUTCOME: frames a hash-pinned sealed acceptance suite, designs the right loop (the loop-design wizard, formerly LoopPrint), war-games it forward, executes with dynamic domain-expert sub-agents (maker != checker), and gates completion on a separate verifier re-running the sealed suite against live state. Outcome-based, not task-completion.

entry.title: macaron
entry.content: Macaron WebUI for Claude Code — streaming GenUI builder, model switcher (Claude / Codex / Macaron), and visual session manager.

entry.title: dsg-governance
entry.content: AI Governance Control Plane that makes every Agent decision provable, auditable, and replayable — Deterministic Safety Gate (Z3/SMT), Cryptographic Proof, Replayable Governance, Compliance Evidence Pack, and Hermes Controlled Executor. Built for VC, CTO, Enterprise Buyer, and Governance Team standards.

entry.title: river-review
entry.content: Capability pack that strengthens AI review for Claude Code: your team's review criteria as versioned, repo-owned skills (a Skill Registry), driven by a review agent that runs perspective-based reviewer roles (code, security, performance, architecture, testing, adversarial) and verifies findings against the diff so humans keep the high-risk judgment.

entry.title: grimoire
entry.content: Every field's professional best practices — your expert consultant in engineering, medicine, law, finance, and more. Anywhere, anytime.

entry.title: foldkit-skills
entry.content: Skills for building Foldkit apps — app generator, message scaffolding, submodel extraction, and architecture auditing

entry.title: confluence-cli
entry.content: Agent-friendly Confluence Cloud CLI with JSON output, semantic exit codes, CQL search, batch operations, and workflow commands.

entry.title: shenbi
entry.content: AI skill framework for novel writing

entry.title: prism
entry.content: Whole-repo code navigation (the prism-mcp server) plus defect-focused diff slicing, packaged for coding agents. Pre-wires the prism MCP server to the current project and ships two Agent Skills (prism-code-navigation, prism-code-slicing) that teach an agent when and how to use them.

entry.title: metate
entry.content: Full development pipeline as Claude Code skills: discover -> prep -> build -> review -> smoke -> aftercare -> ship. The implementer (cursor/codex/claude/gemini) is the only writer and its build session is resumed across review rounds. Project specifics live in .metate/profile.yml; the skills are codebase-agnostic.

entry.title: adversarial-code-review
entry.content: Advisory, criticality-aware code review. Understands a change's intent, scales review depth to risk, reports findings — and never edits your code.

entry.title: exarchos
entry.content: A local-first SDLC workflow harness — structured, durable state for coding agents, with convergence gates, agent teams, and full audit trail.

entry.title: sig
entry.content: Disciplined AI development workflow integrating GSD's execution orchestration, Agent Skills' quality enforcement, and patterns from the broader Claude Code plugin ecosystem — with a project-complexity calibration router that right-sizes rigor per project tier. Slash-command prefix: /sig:* (Signal is the project brand; sig is the namespace).

entry.title: magi
entry.content: Multi-perspective analysis system inspired by Evangelion's MAGI supercomputers. Spawns three sub-agents (Melchior, Balthasar, Caspar) that evaluate code, designs, and decisions from complementary perspectives, then synthesize verdicts via majority vote.

entry.title: clairvoyance
entry.content: A force multiplier for agent-to-human handoffs, turning work into evidence-backed decisions humans can trust.

entry.title: tally-dev-tools
entry.content: Development tools and skills for the Tally project

entry.title: cks
entry.content: 5-phase feature lifecycle toolkit — discover, design, sprint, review, release. Includes Stitch MCP design integration, 11-element discovery, iteration loops, quality gates, and environment promotion. From idea to production.

entry.title: jaas
entry.content: Teach Claude to author and operate JaaS — evaluate Jsonnet over HTTP, and publish JsonnetSnippet / JsonnetLibrary resources as Flux ExternalArtifacts.

entry.title: feima-awesome-harness
entry.content: Core harness library for Claude Code: incident triage, code review, and orchestration flows

entry.title: korean-dart
entry.content: OpenDART 83개 API → 15개 MCP 도구. 금융감독원 전자공시(DART) 기반 AI 리서치 — 공시 검색·재무·XBRL + 버핏 애널리스트 프레임(insider_signal · disclosure_anomaly · buffett_quality_snapshot) + HWP/PDF 첨부 마크다운화

entry.title: agent-harness
entry.content: Portable AI agent harness — curated review/build/test agents, secret-hardening + worktree + plan-gate hooks, and supervise/tdd/diagnose/wrap skills. Install once, use in every project. AI-agnostic core (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini).

entry.title: agentroom
entry.content: Encrypted agent-to-agent chat where one of the two agents runs the relay. E2E encrypted, blind relay, invite-only. Bundles the agentroom CLI (client + relay) and a skill for sending/receiving messages, creating invites, listening, and running the relay.

entry.title: skill-bill
entry.content: Portable AI skill suite centered on feature implementation and code review, currently strongest for Android, KMP, Kotlin backend, and agent-config repositories, with room to expand to additional stacks.

entry.title: claude-dashboard
entry.content: Unified status line for Claude Code with multi-CLI (Claude, Codex, Gemini, z.ai) usage monitoring, context, rate limits, and cost tracking

entry.title: sherpa
entry.content: Develop like a sherpa: composable /spec, /plan, and /implement skills — one per layer (macro, step, build) — with bundled scout/review/build subagents and adversarial pressure at every boundary. The user composes the workflow; sherpa offers the tools. Nothing runs unasked, nothing persists unless you call /persist. Project-agnostic; extend with project packs.

entry.title: agentforge
entry.content: Single-source, multi-runtime agent tooling for core-be: skills, agents, workflow commands, and the requirement to production-ready build pipeline, all driven from agent-os/.

entry.title: audiobook-organizer
entry.content: Expert Claude Code assistance for the audiobook-organizer codebase — shared context loading, Go/DB/docs/PII specialist agents.

entry.title: apple-skills
entry.content: Apple development skills for Claude Code and Codex — iOS 26+ APIs, SwiftUI, UIKit, Liquid Glass, SwiftData, and more.

entry.title: planning-harness
entry.content: 기획자용 상세기획 자동화 하네스 — 8개 스킬(요구사항 분해·시퀀스/플로우·테스트케이스·릴리스노트·개발 핸드오프) + 회의록→GitHub Issue/Project 동기화 엔진. 모든 위험 작업은 사람 승인 게이트.

entry.title: paraqualis-gxp
entry.content: Life-sciences regulatory & computer-system-validation toolkit for Claude Code — GAMP 5, 21 CFR Part 11, EU GMP Annex 11, the live eCFR, openFDA, and an IQ/OQ/PQ qualification engine (/qualify:build, /qualify:requirements, /qualify:review). Commands, skills, sub-agents, and a document-protection hook. Run /openfda:setup once to provision a free personal openFDA API key (one minute, raises rate limits ~1,000 → ~120,000 requests/day).

entry.title: cc-imessage-control
entry.content: Text yourself 'Claude <projectname>' OR 'skill <command>'. Your Mac (iMessage) or Linux box opens a new local Claude Code session with /remote-control enabled — 'Claude' mode opens the project; 'skill' mode runs a plugin's slash command in its project dir. Drive both from the Claude mobile app. No chat.db reading.

entry.title: turbofy
entry.content: Turbofy MCP integration plus guidance skills for building apps, block types, and dynamic fields on the Turbofy platform.

entry.title: themekit
entry.content: ThemeKit SwiftUI design-system skill — tokenized components, runtime theming, theme presets, chainable modifiers.

entry.title: intership
entry.content: Culture ship names as Claude Code spinner verbs. Because why would you settle for 'Thinking...' when you could have 'Experiencing A Significant Gravitas Shortfall'?

entry.title: german-technical-writing
entry.content: Natural German technical register for Jira comments and descriptions, internal German-language documentation, and team-chat messages

entry.title: scribe
entry.content: per-project・Claude Code ネイティブの実装 administrator(ユーザー代理 AI)プラグイン。substrate(cc-session/beads/doobidoo)を compose し、spawn/監視/gate/role 別文脈注入を担う orchestration 層。v0 = 堀なし軽量モード(成文化 + 道具 + 3 role SessionStart 注入)。

entry.title: devant
entry.content: A single-command, intent-aware coding companion. Onboards by scanning the repo with codegraph, captures the project's vision/direction/non-goals/rules as a local intent graph you own, and works like a teammate who knows what to do and what NOT to do. Lean, fast, ceremony scaled to blast radius. Everything it stores stays local and is never committed.

entry.title: easy-cheese
entry.content: easy-cheese — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: musts
entry.content: Validation loop for Claude Code — runs `musts validate` before each `git commit` and blocks the commit until the loop is clean.

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: architect-skills
entry.content: 29 specialized Claude Code skills for building architecture. Core 18 skills cover design theory, building programming, concept design, building typology, spatial planning, envelope design, structural systems, MEP services, daylighting, materials, building codes, accessibility, fire safety, acoustics, building-scale sustainability, and construction documentation. Country-specific dossiers (v1.1.0) provide clause-level regulatory precision for 10 priority jurisdictions: India (NBC 2016, ECBC, IS codes, state DCRs), UAE (Dubai Building Code 2021, ADIBC, UAE FLS Code 2018, Estidama, Al Sa'fat), Saudi Arabia (SBC 201-1001, Mostadamah, NEOM/Royal Commission jurisdictions), USA (IBC 2024, IECC 2024, NFPA 101, ADA 2010, ASCE 7-22, state amendments incl. CA Title 24, NYC, FL HVHZ), UK (Building Regulations 2010 + Approved Documents A-S, Building Safety Act 2022, BSR/HRB, Scotland/Wales/NI), Germany (MBO + 16 LBOs, GEG 2023, DIN 18040/4109/4108, Eurocode NAs), Singapore (BCA Building Control Act, SCDF Fire Code 2018, Green Mark 2021, URA Master Plan), Japan (Building Standards Act, two-level seismic design, Sho-Energy Ho 2015, Heart Building Law, AIJ standards, BCJ evaluation), China (GB 50352-2019, GB 50016-2014, GB 50011-2010, JGJ residential energy codes, DB local supplements, sunlight rights), Australia (NCC 2022 Vol 1-3, AS/NZS 1170 series, AS 1428.1-2021, NatHERS 7-star, state planning systems). Geographic-foundations skill auto-detects jurisdiction and routes to the correct country dossier. References 50+ architects and theorists, IBC/Eurocodes/ASCE/ASHRAE/ADA/NFPA/ISO standards, sustainability frameworks (LEED, BREEAM, Passive House, DGNB, CASBEE, Green Mark, Green Star, NABERS, Mostadamah, Estidama, GRIHA, IGBC). Includes 7 Python calculators.
